title: CI: update no new tests filter list
body:
The PR test requirement is outdated as it contains many dirs that really do not need tests

https://github.com/podman-container-tools/podman/blob/2d369caca7ca1bc3963cef416e2ab5dc464db701/hack/ci/pr-should-include-tests#L26-L44

for example any of the rpm/packit changes do not need tests but will need the explicit label

IMO, we should do the same as we do for the CI conditionals, actual tests only run when we chnage .go/.c/.h files https://github.com/podman-container-tools/podman/blob/2d369caca7ca1bc3963cef416e2ab5dc464db701/.github/filters.yaml#L11-L13

That is much easier to reason about and should not need regular updates unless we add new code languages.
